creator: lifanov@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Yuri,

This builds fine with "make package", but poudriere complains:

===>  Performing out-of-source build
/bin/mkdir -p /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/tribits/work/.build
env: -L/usr/local/lib/gcc49: No such file or directory
*** Error code 127


Maybe USES=fortran is not sufficient?
